arts.ttl: Kai Havertz reveals the moment that changed his Arsenal career and hails captain Martin Odegaard for 'stepping up' as a leader after returning from injury
arts.sum: Kai Havertz (left) hailed the leadership qualities of Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard (inset) and revealed the moment that changed his Gunners career after a tough start at the club.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot responds to claims Liverpool have key title advantage over Arsenal and Man City
arts.sum: The Premier League leaders, four points clear with a game in hand, are also currently top of the Champions League table after five successive wins and are on the verge of guaranteeing a top-eight place

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners receive boost in chase for £80m-rated Premier League forward?
arts.sum: Arsenal allegedly receive a boost ahead of a potential chase for an £80m-rated Premier League attacker.

arts.ttl: Gabriel Jesus a huge concern as Arsenal miss major opportunity against Fulham
arts.sum: Opportunity missed for Arsenal as one player’s form is a real concern Sunday’s draw at Fulham felt like a massive opportunity missed for Arsenal after Liverpool’s game at Everton had been postponed earlier in the weekend. It was a real chance for Mikel Arteta’s side to close the gap on the league leaders and they […] The post Gabriel Jesus a huge concern as Arsenal miss major opportunity against Fulham appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Premier League announce TV fixture changes including huge Man Utd and Liverpool games
arts.sum: Manchester United have been selected for three TV matches in February, while Arsenal, Liverpool and Manchester City all have key fixtures being televised that month
